oNas.title: Family Clinic
oNas.missionText1: We are a team of professionals running a family dental clinic in Opole. Our mission is to ensure your smile is not only beautiful but above all healthy.
oNas.missionText2: At Mikrostomart, we combine years of experience with the latest achievements in medical technology. We specialise in microscope dentistry, which allows us to achieve unparalleled treatment precision.
oNas.elaQuote: Always smiling and cheerful. The most joyful and upbeat person on our team.
oNas.elaText1: A dental hygienist with passion and a clinic manager at the same time. Thanks to her dedication, the organisation of the clinic is second to none. Patients — both the youngest and the not-so-young — love her cheerful approach to life and work.
oNas.elaText2: With her empathy, she can calm and convince even the most stressed patients to undergo treatment. She takes care of patients' well-being by creating a friendly atmosphere and a sense of security.
oNas.elaText3: She gained her knowledge and skills in dental hygiene at TEB Edukacja and continues to expand them through specialised courses and training.
oNas.marcinQuote: I believe precision is the key to longevity. That's why in my work, the microscope is not an addition — it's the standard.
oNas.marcinText1: Graduate of the Medical Academy in Wrocław. A man with a passion and calling for dentistry, for whom every day is a new challenge. Master of Science in Lasers in Dentistry (RWTH Aachen University).
oNas.marcinText2: Dentist, enthusiast of microscopic endodontics, prosthetic treatment under magnification, dental implantology and laser dentistry.
oNas.marcinText3: He gained professional experience in the best clinics in the region. In 2021, he obtained with distinction — as the second in Poland and the youngest dentist in the country — the title 'Master of Science in Lasers in Dentistry'.
oNas.marcinText4: Privately, the husband of Elżbieta and father of little Michael and Lily. Off-road snowboarding fan and bass guitar sound enthusiast.

implantologia.title: Dental Implants Opole
implantologia.subtitle: Teeth implants Opole
implantologia.intro1: Implant procedures at Mikrostomart are ALWAYS performed using DIGITAL PLANNING, based on which a surgical guide is created for every procedure. This makes the procedure fast, safe, and the implant position exactly as planned in the visualisation.
implantologia.intro2: Such precision cannot be achieved manually. We offer a minimally invasive procedure for placing dental implants using custom surgical guides designed from CT scans.
implantologia.whenIntro: Missing teeth are a serious problem. At Mikrostomart in Opole we use the latest medical advances:
implantologia.benefit1: We know the exact implant position before surgery (minimal complication risk).
implantologia.benefit2: Implant position is dictated by the future crown (aesthetics and function).
implantologia.benefit3: Shorter procedure time and less invasiveness (often no sutures).
implantologia.benefit5: AnyTimeLoading option (crown loading at any time).
implantologia.structureText: A modern implant consists of a fixture (titanium screw in bone), an abutment, and a crown (the visible part). Each component is individually selected to ensure durability and perfect aesthetics indistinguishable from natural teeth.
implantologia.faqA1: Yes, we precede it with a detailed interview and CT scans.
implantologia.faqA2: No, it is performed under effective local anaesthesia. Post-procedure discomfort is comparable to a tooth extraction.
implantologia.faqA3: Properly placed implants with good hygiene can last a lifetime.
implantologia.faqA4: Uncontrolled diabetes, pregnancy, severe systemic diseases, age under 16.

cennik.heroSubtitle: Ask about procedure costs — our AI assistant will give you an estimated price and calculate the total.
cennik.disclaimer: ⚠️ Prices shown are approximate. Final cost is determined by the dentist after consultation. To book an appointment call: 570-270-470
cennik.speechNotSupported: Your browser does not support speech recognition. Try Chrome or Edge.
cennik.errorTechnical: Sorry, a technical error occurred. Try again or call: 570-270-470.
cennik.errorConnection: Connection error. Check your internet or call: 570-270-470.
cennik.welcomeMessage:
Hello! 👋 I'm Mikrostomart's smart pricing assistant.

Ask me about the cost of any procedure — e.g. "How much does an implant + crown cost?" — and I'll give you an estimate.

You can also type a question or dictate it 🎤
cennik.cat3q: How much does a dental cleaning cost?
cennik.cat5q: How much does clear aligner orthodontics cost?

faq.cat0q0: Why is regular dental hygiene important?
faq.cat0a0: Professional cleaning (scaling, air polishing) removes tartar and deposits that cannot be removed at home. It prevents gum diseases (periodontitis), cavities, and bad breath. We recommend a visit every 6 months.
faq.cat0q1: What is the difference between scaling and air polishing?
faq.cat0a1: Scaling removes hard tartar using ultrasound. Air polishing removes soft deposits and stains (e.g. from coffee, tea) using a pressurised stream of powder. These treatments are usually performed together.
faq.cat0a2: Yes, in-office fluoridation is completely safe and a key element in strengthening enamel. We use certified preparations at appropriate concentrations that protect teeth from cavities.
faq.cat0q3: Which toothbrush do you recommend — sonic or electric?
faq.cat0a3: We strongly recommend sonic toothbrushes. They are gentler on gums while more effectively removing plaque thanks to cavitation (microbubbles), which reaches hard-to-access areas.
faq.cat0q4: My gums bleed when brushing. What should I do?
faq.cat0a4: Bleeding is usually the first sign of inflammation (gingivitis) caused by tartar buildup. Don't stop brushing! Book a professional cleaning — removing the cause usually resolves the problem immediately.
faq.cat1a0: Modern root canal treatment is completely painless. We use computer-controlled anaesthesia (The Wand/SleeperOne), which eliminates pain from the injection stage. Patients often fall asleep during the procedure!
faq.cat1q1: Why is treatment under a microscope better?
faq.cat1a1: The microscope (up to 25x magnification) allows the dentist to find all canals (even additional ones), clean and fill them precisely. This dramatically increases the chance of saving a tooth that might otherwise be extracted.
faq.cat1q2: How many visits does a root canal take?
faq.cat1a2: At Mikrostomart, we aim to complete root canal treatment in one visit. Thanks to microscope work and advanced machine tools, we can perform the entire procedure precisely and efficiently in 90-120 minutes.
faq.cat1q3: My tooth doesn't hurt — do I need a root canal?
faq.cat1a3: Pain is not the only indicator. Often, inflammation develops chronically in the bone (granuloma) and is only visible on X-ray. This condition is a 'ticking time bomb' and a source of infection for the entire body, so treatment is necessary.
faq.cat1a4: This is a corrective procedure when the original treatment (often years old) proves unsuccessful. It involves removing the old material, finding missed canals, and filling them again under sterile conditions. This is a more complex procedure in which our clinic specialises.
faq.cat2a0: Veneers are thin shells (porcelain or composite) bonded to the front of a tooth. They correct shape, colour, and minor irregularities. They can achieve a 'Hollywood Smile' effect without braces if the issue is minor.
faq.cat2a1: No, professional whitening performed in-office under the hygienist's supervision is safe. We use modern preparations that do not demineralise enamel — they only oxidise the stains within its structure.
faq.cat2q2: How long does the whitening effect last?
faq.cat2a2: The effect typically lasts 1 to 3 years. It depends mainly on your diet (coffee, wine, turmeric) and habits (smoking). Regular hygiene appointments help maintain the results.
faq.cat2a3: Bonding is a non-invasive method of improving tooth aesthetics using composite resin. We do it in one visit, without grinding teeth. Ideal for closing a diastema (gap between teeth) or repairing a chipped edge.
faq.cat2q4: How long does it take to get porcelain veneers?
faq.cat2a4: The process usually takes 2-3 visits. The first is a consultation and design (DSD). The second is minimal preparation and scanning (no impressions!). The third is cementing the finished, beautiful veneers.
faq.cat3a0: Most adult patients can have implants. Contraindications may include certain uncontrolled systemic diseases. The key factor is bone volume — if insufficient, we perform regenerative procedures.
faq.cat3q1: How long does the procedure and healing take?
faq.cat3a1: Implant placement itself usually takes 30-40 minutes and is painless. The osseointegration process (bonding with bone) takes 3 to 6 months, after which the final crown is placed.
faq.cat3a2: Implant success rate is about 98%. Rejection is extremely rare. If it does occur (e.g. due to infection or smoking), the procedure can usually be repeated after healing.
faq.cat3q3: Do implants set off airport metal detectors?
faq.cat3a3: Absolutely not! Implants are made of titanium or zirconia, which are non-magnetic and do not trigger security gates. You can travel worry-free.
faq.cat3a4: It's a procedure where we remove a damaged tooth and place an implant in its place during the same visit. This saves time (one procedure, one anaesthesia) and preserves more bone and gum tissue.
faq.cat4q0: Crown or veneer — which to choose?
faq.cat4a0: A veneer covers only the front of the tooth (aesthetics). A crown covers the entire tooth like a cap (restoration and reinforcement). The decision is made by the dentist based on the degree of tooth damage.
faq.cat4a1: This is a common name for adhesive bridges (fibre-reinforced). They are a temporary or long-term solution that fills a missing tooth gap without heavy grinding of neighbours.
faq.cat4q2: What material do you use for crowns?
faq.cat4a2: We prioritise the highest aesthetics and durability, so we mainly use all-ceramic crowns (E.max) and zirconia crowns. They don't cause gum 'greying' (like old metal-based crowns) and are indistinguishable from natural teeth.
faq.cat4q3: What does the crown-making process look like?
faq.cat4a3: Thanks to our digital scanner, we don't need unpleasant impression moulds. We scan teeth with a 3D camera and send the design to the laboratory. The finished crown is cemented usually within 5-7 working days.
faq.cat5q0: How do Clear Correct aligners work?
faq.cat5a0: It's a set of transparent trays that you change every 1-2 weeks. Each successive aligner gently moves teeth into position. They are removable for eating and cleaning, ensuring hygiene and comfort.
faq.cat5a1: With aligners, pain is minimal — patients describe it more as a 'pressure sensation' for 1-2 days after fitting a new pair. This is incomparably less discomfort than with fixed metal braces.
faq.cat5q2: How long does orthodontic treatment take?
faq.cat5a2: Aligner treatment is usually shorter than traditional. Average duration is 6-18 months, depending on the condition. At the first visit, we'll show you a 3D simulation and tell you exactly how long your treatment will take.
faq.cat5q3: Won't teeth move back after removing braces?
faq.cat5a3: We use retention (a thin wire on the inside or a night aligner) that holds teeth in their new position. This is a standard procedure guaranteeing lasting results.
faq.cat6q0: When should wisdom teeth be removed?
faq.cat6a0: When there's not enough space in the arch (crowding), they cause inflammation, decay in adjacent teeth, or cysts. We assess this based on a panoramic X-ray.
faq.cat6a1: It's platelet-rich fibrin obtained from the patient's blood. It acts as a natural 'super-bandage', accelerating wound healing after extraction by several times.
faq.cat6a2: Don't eat for 2 hours. On the day of the procedure, avoid hot food and physical exertion. Don't rinse your mouth vigorously (to avoid dislodging the clot). Apply cold compresses. If in doubt, call the clinic.
faq.cat6a3: It occurs rarely (about 2-5%), mainly in smokers or women using hormonal contraception. To prevent it, we use PRF and ozone therapy, which dramatically reduce complication risk.
faq.cat7q0: When should a child's first visit be?
faq.cat7a0: We invite you for a first introductory visit at age 2-3, or earlier if something concerns you. It's a playful visit without treatment that builds the young patient's trust in the dentist.
faq.cat7a1: Of course! Healthy baby teeth mean healthy permanent teeth. Untreated cavities in children can lead to bite problems in the future. We use colourful fillings that children love.
faq.cat7a2: Sealant application protects the grooves in molars (permanent sixth teeth) with a special coating. Grooves are where cavities develop fastest because the toothbrush can't reach them. The procedure is quick and completely painless.
faq.cat7q3: My child is afraid of the dentist. How do you handle this?
faq.cat7a3: We have extensive experience with young patients. We use the 'tell-show-do' method. We use 'magic air' (nitrous oxide sedation), cartoons on the ceiling screen, and rewards. We don't treat by force — we build a relationship.
faq.cat8q0: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.cat8a0: We accept cash, debit/credit cards, and BLIK. Instalment payment is also available through MediRaty (prior verification required).
faq.cat8a1: No, we are a private clinic and don't require any referrals. Simply book a consultation appointment.
faq.cat8a2: There is a private, free car park directly in front of the clinic for patients. You'll never have to look for a spot or pay a parking meter.
faq.cat8q3: How should I prepare for my first visit?
faq.cat8a3: If you have a recent panoramic X-ray (no older than 6 months), bring it with you. Prepare a list of medications you take. If a specific tooth hurts, try to identify what triggers it (cold, heat, biting).
faq.cat9q0: Do you offer a treatment warranty?
faq.cat9a0: Yes, we provide a 2-year warranty on fillings and prosthetic work. Maintaining it requires regular check-up and hygiene visits every 6 months (as recommended by your dentist).
faq.cat9q1: What if something hurts after a procedure?
faq.cat9a1: Mild discomfort after certain procedures is normal, but your peace of mind is our top priority. In case of severe pain or concerning symptoms, please contact us — we will always find time to check that healing is progressing properly.
faq.cat9a2: Sterilisation is our absolute priority. We use a top medical-grade autoclave (Class B). All instruments are packed in sterile pouches opened in front of the patient. Dental handpieces are oiled and sterilised after every patient.

politykaCookies.title: Cookie Policy
politykaCookies.subtitle: Transparency in the use of technology
politykaCookies.card1Text: These are small text files sent by a web server and stored by your browser software. When the browser reconnects to the site, the website recognises the type of device the user is connecting from.
politykaCookies.card2Title: What do we use them for?
politykaCookies.card2Li2: Creating anonymous statistics that help us understand how users interact with the site.
politykaCookies.card2Li3: Ensuring the security and reliability of the service.
politykaCookies.card3Text: You can change your cookie settings at any time. Restricting cookies may affect some features available on the website.
politykaCookies.card4EssentialDesc: required for the website to function properly (e.g. session, cookie consent).
politykaCookies.card4AnalyticsDesc: anonymous statistics that help improve the website.

politykaPriv.title: Privacy Policy
politykaPriv.subtitle: We care about the security of your personal data
politykaPriv.sec1Text: The controller of your personal data is Mikrostomart Dental Practice located in Opole at ul. Centralna 33a.
politykaPriv.sec2Title: II. Purposes and Legal Bases for Processing
politykaPriv.sec2Intro: We process your data for the purpose of:
politykaPriv.sec2Li1: Booking appointments and maintaining medical records (in accordance with patient rights legislation).
politykaPriv.sec2Li2: Contacting you regarding organisational matters (appointment confirmation).
politykaPriv.sec2Li3: Responding to enquiries submitted via the contact form.
politykaPriv.sec3Text: You have the right to access your data, rectify, erase (to the extent not contrary to medical documentation obligations), and lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority.
politykaPriv.sec4Text: For data protection matters, please contact us at:
